body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35352", "cvss": {"score": 7.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-367", "name": "Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition"}], "description": "A Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition exists in the mkfifo utility of uutils coreutils. The utility creates a FIFO and then performs a path-based chmod to set permissions. A local attacker with write access to the parent directory can swap the newly created FIFO for a symbolic link between these two operations. This redirects the chmod call to an arbitrary file, potentially enabling privilege escalation if the utility is run with elevated privileges.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00147, "percentile": 0.04293}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9gh9-hwpr-rvqq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:09:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9gh9-hwpr-rvqq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9gh9-hwpr-rvqq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35352"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:37Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35352", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/10020", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/04/4", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/04/5", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/04/6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9gh9-hwpr-rvqq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "uutils coreutils has a Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T01:25:00Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9gh9-hwpr-rvqq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
